completed_tasks.name: Download real energy type SVGs to /public/icons/energy/
Replace inline SVG EnergyIcon with image-based component (PNG)
Fix featured set: pokemontcg.io release dates enrich TCGdex set sort
SKIP_FEATURED regex excludes promo/energy sets from featured slot
ERA_ORDER expanded: me/ecard/neo/gym/si/lc/base for correct filter ordering
Trainer/Energy modal: effect box shown even when effect text missing
Modal: removed Shield/Swords icons from abilities/attacks
Modal: ability type label (Ability/Poké-Power) now red

Modal: card info grid (Artist, Rarity, Language, Number, Expansion, Series) for all cards
Page: Jump to top button at bottom of card list
Page: Reset to featured set button after search
Supplement TCGdex weakness/resistance/retreat from pokemontcg.io on card open

Deploy to Vercel + set env vars

human_actions_pending.action: Set up Supabase project and add env vars to .env.local
human_actions_pending.context: Auth and deck saving require NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY. supabase/schema.sql is ready to run.

human_actions_pending.action: Deploy to Vercel and configure environment variables
human_actions_pending.context: Project builds clean. Needs Vercel project creation and env vars set in dashboard.

decisions.decision: EnergyIcon uses user-provided PNG files from /public/icons/energy/ — no CSS circle wrapper
decisions.rationale: User downloaded official circular energy symbols with background already baked in

decisions.decision: pokemontcg.io used as secondary source for set release dates (name→date map)
decisions.rationale: TCGdex brief set endpoint returns no release dates; ptcgio has accurate dates by set name

decisions.decision: Supplement TCGdex card weakness/resistance/retreat from pokemontcg.io on card open
decisions.rationale: TCGdex omits these fields for modern sets (sv10, me03 confirmed missing weaknesses); ptcgio has complete data

decisions.decision: Series name derived from set ID prefix in modal (me→Mega Evolution, sv→Scarlet & Violet, etc.)
decisions.rationale: TCGdex card endpoint does not include serie in the set field returned on card detail

decisions.decision: Perfect Order (me03) correctly featured — TCGdex now indexes it; ptcgio date enrichment ranks it first
decisions.rationale: TCGdex uses me prefix for Mega Evolution era; sort by release date works correctly

next_action: Ask user if they have Supabase set up. If yes, get env vars and implement auth end-to-end: install @supabase/supabase-js + @supabase/ssr, create src/lib/supabase/ utilities, build /signup and /login pages, add middleware.ts, protect /decks and /dashboard, wire Save Deck button.
context_notes: Card browser is in excellent shape. Build is clean (0 TS errors). pokemontcg.io is used as secondary source: (1) release dates for set ordering on mount, (2) weakness/resistance/retreat supplement on card detail open — silent fallback if ptcgio fails. TCGdex is primary card data source. Energy icons are real PNGs from user in /public/icons/energy/. Modal now shows complete card info grid for all card types including trainer/energy. Jump-to-top and Reset-to-featured-set buttons added to bottom of card list.
